cases.title: TS-22: Device coordinates within session gpsRadiusMeters pass Haversine radius check
preconditions: Active session with room GPS (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Authenticated enrolled Student with Pending attendance
Valid unexpired QrToken from GET /sessions/:sessionId/qr/current
Student device coordinates inside radius (10.762700, 106.660200)
TestClock within attendance window; spoofMetadata.mockLocationDetected false
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId, latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200 using Student session
Assert HTTP status 200 and outcome Success
Assert attendance.status Present in response
Query check_in_attempts for latest attempt and assert outcome Success with distance_meters ≤ 100
Verify GeoVerificationService radius check passed per BR-02 before attendance update
cases.expected: Haversine distance ≤ session gpsRadiusMeters; BR-02 radius check passes and flow continues to Present when all other pipeline steps pass

cases.title: TS-23: Device coordinates outside configured radius return OutOfRadius without Present
preconditions: Active session with room GPS (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Authenticated enrolled Student with Pending attendance
Valid unexpired QrToken
Student coordinates outside radius (~167 m north: 10.764122, 106.660172)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId, latitude 10.764122, longitude 106.660172 using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response outcome OutOfRadius and errorCode OutOfRadius
Assert localized message contains Bạn đang ngoài phạm vi phòng học per error-handling §6.2
Query attendance_records for studentId and sessionId and assert status remains Pending (not Present)
Query check_in_attempts and assert outcome OutOfRadius with distance_meters logged and no raw lat/lng persisted
cases.expected: BR-02 rejects check-in when Haversine distance > gpsRadiusMeters; attendance not set to Present; distance value logged for audit

cases.title: GeoVerificationService.verifyLocation enforces Haversine ≤ gpsRadiusMeters at module boundary
preconditions: GeoVerificationService wired in checkin-qr module per domain model §7.1
Room coordinates (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100 loaded from Session fixture
ClientGeoMetadata with mockLocationDetected false
steps: Call verifyLocation(roomLat, roomLng, clientLat 10.762700, clientLng 106.660200, radiusMeters 100, metadata)
Assert result.withinRadius true and distanceMeters ≤ 100
Call verifyLocation with outside client coords (10.764122, 106.660172)
Assert result.withinRadius false and distanceMeters > 100
Assert client coordinates exist only in memory during call (not written to DB)
cases.expected: GeoVerificationService implements BR-02 Haversine distance comparison against session room point and configurable radius

cases.title: CheckInService OutOfRadius persists distance_meters on check_in_attempts without raw coordinates
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, enrollment, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
CheckInService orchestrates GeoVerificationService then serializable transaction per domain model §5.2
steps: Invoke CheckInService.submit with valid tokenId and out-of-radius coordinates
Query check_in_attempts for the attempt row
Assert outcome OutOfRadius and distance_meters is NOT NULL and greater than session gpsRadiusMeters
Assert attendance_records row remains Pending
Assert no latitude or longitude columns populated on check_in_attempts or attendance_records
cases.expected: BR-02 outcome logs distance for audit without persisting raw device coordinates long-term per domain model §4.10 privacy rule

cases.title: OutOfRadius rejection leaves Attendance Pending allowing retry after moving within radius
preconditions: Pending attendance_records row in PostgreSQL for enrolled student and Active session
Valid QrToken; CheckInService.submit callable with out-of-radius coordinates
steps: Record beforeState Attendance status Pending
Invoke CheckInService.submit with outside-radius coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
Assert CheckInAttempt outcome OutOfRadius inserted
Query attendance_records and assert afterState remains Pending (not Present or Absent)
Invoke CheckInService.submit again with in-radius coordinates and fresh token; assert Success and Present
cases.expected: beforeState Pending; afterState Pending on OutOfRadius per BR-02; student may retry when within radius

cases.title: POST /check-in with in-radius coordinates returns 200 Success envelope after BR-02 pass
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie set
Active sessionId with Valid QrToken and in-radius coordinates available
steps: Send POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId, latitude: 10.762700, longitude: 106.660200, spoofMetadata: { mockLocationDetected: false, platform: "android" } }
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response outcome Success and attendance.status Present
Assert no errorCode field on success per API design §6.2
cases.expected: HTTP 200 Success contract when GPS within radius per BR-02 and all prior pipeline steps pass

cases.title: POST /check-in with out-of-radius coordinates returns 400 OutOfRadius envelope
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session
Active session with gpsRadiusMeters 100 and room (10.762622, 106.660172)
Valid unexpired QrToken
Outside coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId and outside-radius latitude/longitude
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response body outcome OutOfRadius and errorCode OutOfRadius
Assert message field contains Bạn đang ngoài phạm vi phòng học per error-handling §6.2 and validation-rules §4 BR-02 mapping
Assert no attendance Present in response body
cases.expected: HTTP 400 OutOfRadius per validation-rules §4 and API design §6.3; canonical BR-02 failure envelope

cases.title: GPS at Haversine distance equal to gpsRadiusMeters passes inclusive radius check
preconditions: Active session with room (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Client coordinates at ~100 m from room point (10.763520, 106.660172) per geo fixture math
Authenticated enrolled Student, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with boundary coordinates (10.763520, 106.660172)
Assert HTTP status 200 outcome Success
Assert distanceMeters on check_in_attempts ≤ 100 (inclusive boundary per HaversineDistance unit tests)
Contrast: coordinates at 10.764122 (~167 m) with same session assert 400 OutOfRadius
cases.expected: BR-02 uses ≤ comparison; student at exactly radius boundary passes; just outside fails

cases.title: Session gpsRadiusMeters override 200 m accepts student at ~167 m from room point
preconditions: Active session with room (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 200 (instructor override at session creation)
Authenticated enrolled Student with coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172) ~167 m from room
Valid unexpired QrToken; all non-GPS pipeline checks pass
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId and coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
Assert HTTP status 200 outcome Success (would fail with default 100 m radius)
Assert attendance Present
Verify distance ~167 m ≤ 200 m override radius per session gpsRadiusMeters field
cases.expected: BR-02 honors instructor-adjustable gpsRadiusMeters (default 100 m, range 20–500); distance ≤ configured radius not fixed default

cases.title: Minimum session gpsRadiusMeters 20 m rejects student at 25 m from room point
preconditions: Active session with room (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 20 (minimum allowed)
Authenticated enrolled Student with coordinates ~25 m from room (10.762847, 106.660172)
Valid unexpired QrToken
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId and coordinates ~25 m from room
Assert HTTP status 400 outcome OutOfRadius
Assert distance_meters on check_in_attempts > 20
Repeat with coordinates ~15 m from room and assert HTTP 200 Success
cases.expected: BR-02 enforces session-specific minimum radius boundary; distance just outside 20 m fails

cases.title: Flow B step 5: Student C outside radius receives OutOfRadius in anti-fraud rejection path
preconditions: Flow B steps 1–4 complete: Active session, Student A checked in, Student A duplicate rejected
Student B same-token rejection already exercised
Student C authenticated and enrolled with outside-radius coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
Fresh Valid QrToken issued for Student C
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in as Student C with outside-radius coordinates and fresh tokenId
Assert HTTP 400 outcome OutOfRadius
Assert Student C attendance remains Pending
Verify Flow B anti-fraud path includes GPS rejection per testing-plan §6 Flow B
cases.expected: Flow B step 5 validates BR-02 alongside anti-fraud scenarios; OutOfRadius without Present

cases.title: Check-in pipeline evaluates spoof heuristics at step 12 before BR-02 radius at step 13
preconditions: CheckInService with injectable pipeline steps per validation-rules §5.1
Active session, enrolled student, Valid QrToken, in-radius coordinates
spoofMetadata.mockLocationDetected true (SpoofSuspected path)
steps: Invoke CheckInService.submit with in-radius coordinates and mockLocationDetected true
Assert outcome SpoofSuspected (not OutOfRadius)
Assert GeoVerificationService radius check was not reached or did not determine final outcome
Query check_in_attempts and assert outcome SpoofSuspected without Present attendance
cases.expected: BR-02 exception clause: FR-10 spoof handling runs before radius check per rule interaction matrix order 7 then 8

cases.title: Instructor denied POST /check-in with GPS payload (lacks checkin:submit)
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session available
Active session with valid room GPS and QrToken
Instructor role lacks checkin:submit per roles-permissions §2.2
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and in-radius coordinates using Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Verify no GPS radius evaluation creates Present attendance for instructor userId
Assert permission guard runs before Layer 4 BR-02 domain checks
cases.expected: BR-02 applies to Student check-in submissions only; Instructor cannot invoke radius verification via check-in endpoint

cases.title: Mobile check-in journey: in-radius GPS coordinates enable successful submit after server validation
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport 375×812 (iOS Safari or Android Chrome)
Active session check-in deep link /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200 outcome Valid for enrolled student per BR-15
Browser geolocation granted with in-radius mock coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200)
steps: Navigate to check-in page on mobile viewport
Verify validating_token inline spinner during preflight; GpsCaptureStep mounts only after preflight 200 per BR-15
Wait for GpsCaptureStep ready substate: Vị trí đã sẵn sàng without Spinner; submit region aria-busy false or absent per AC-08f
Tap submit control (Xác nhận điểm danh); verify submitting substate with spinner until API responds per AC-08g
Verify success panel with Present status after BR-02 radius validation passes on server
Verify no raw GPS coordinates displayed in UI beyond transient capture state
cases.expected: Mobile web path: BR-15 preflight gates GPS step; AC-08f ready UX then AC-08g submit flight; server enforces BR-02 Haversine check; success confirmation shown

cases.title: Mobile check-in OutOfRadius outcome panel shows Vietnamese message and retry guidance
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport with GPS permission granted
Active session check-in deep link with valid token
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200 outcome Valid; GpsCaptureStep mounted per BR-15
Browser geolocation mocked to outside-radius coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
steps: Navigate to /check-in page; wait for preflight pass then GPS capture with outside coordinates
Submit check-in
Verify outcome panel displays OutOfRadius state with message Bạn đang ngoài phạm vi phòng học
Verify distance hint Bạn cách phòng học khoảng {n} m (cho phép {radius} m) visible per event-specific-components §2.2 and user-flows §3
Verify no Present success badge; student can retry after moving closer within radius
cases.expected: BR-02 OutOfRadius outcome surfaced in mobile UI after BR-15 preflight and GPS capture; localized message and recovery action shown

cases.title: Instructor manual override to Present after OutOfRadius per BR-02 exception and BR-10
preconditions: Active session with student attendance Pending after OutOfRadius check_in_attempt
Session Closed within 24 hours of closedAt
Assigned Instructor session with attendance:write permission
steps: Verify student attendance status Pending with prior OutOfRadius attempt logged
Instructor PATCH /attendance/:recordId with status Present and note physical verification
Assert HTTP 200 and attendance status Present
Query attendance_audit_logs and assert editorId, previousStatus Pending, newStatus Present, and note captured
cases.expected: BR-02 exception: instructor manual override to Present after physical verification per BR-10 edit window

cases.title: Flow A step 4: in-radius GPS coordinates complete workshop check-in after radius verification
preconditions: Flow A steps 1–3 complete: roster seeded, session opened Active with room GPS, QR token polled
Authenticated enrolled Student session established
Student coordinates within session gpsRadiusMeters (10.762700, 106.660200)
tokenId extracted from qrPayload returned in step 3
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId from Flow A step 3 and in-radius latitude/longitude using Student session
Assert HTTP 200 outcome Success with attendance Present
Query check_in_attempts and assert distance_meters ≤ session gpsRadiusMeters
Verify no raw lat/lng persisted in attendance or attempt tables
cases.expected: Flow A happy-path includes BR-02 GPS radius verification before Present attendance in workshop lifecycle

cases.title: OutOfRadius only applies while session status is Active per BR-02 scope
preconditions: Closed session with student attendance Absent
Valid or expired QrToken for closed session
In-radius coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200) available
steps: Invoke CheckInService.submit or POST /api/v1/check-in with in-radius coordinates for Closed session
Assert outcome SessionNotActive (not OutOfRadius)
Verify BR-02 radius evaluation not reached because session state guard fails first per pipeline step 5
cases.expected: BR-02 scope is all check-in attempts while session Active; Closed session rejects before radius check with SessionNotActive

cases.title: Maximum session gpsRadiusMeters 500 m accepts student at ~450 m from room point
preconditions: Active session with room (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 500 (maximum allowed per validation-rules §3.4)
Authenticated enrolled Student with coordinates ~450 m from room (10.766667, 106.660172)
Valid unexpired QrToken; all non-GPS pipeline checks pass
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId and coordinates ~450 m from room
Assert HTTP status 200 outcome Success (would fail with default 100 m radius)
Assert attendance Present
Repeat with coordinates ~520 m from room and assert HTTP 400 OutOfRadius
Assert distance_meters on failed attempt > 500
cases.expected: BR-02 honors maximum instructor-adjustable gpsRadiusMeters 500 m; distance ≤ configured radius passes; just outside maximum fails

cases.title: TS-21e: GpsCaptureStep ready substate hides spinner and enables submit before BR-02 server validation
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport 375×812
Valid token deep link; GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200 outcome Valid per BR-15
Geolocation resolves in-radius coordinates (gpsState transitions to ready)
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId and wait for preflight pass
Wait for GpsCaptureStep substate ready after coordinates acquired within session gpsRadiusMeters
Assert no spinner visible in GPS step region
Assert check icon and text Vị trí đã sẵn sàng displayed
Assert submit region aria-busy is false or absent per AC-08f
Assert Xác nhận điểm danh button enabled immediately before POST /check-in
cases.expected: AC-08f satisfied: GPS ready-state UX per ui-states §4.2 — static check icon, no spinner, submit enabled when in-radius coordinates acquired; BR-02 validation occurs only on submit

cases.title: GpsCaptureStep submitting substate shows spinner until BR-02 radius-validated API outcome
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport
Valid token deep link; preflight passed; GpsCaptureStep in ready state with in-radius coordinates
Mocked geolocation granted or VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true with gpsSim=delay for harness
steps: Navigate to check-in page and wait for GpsCaptureStep ready state (Vị trí đã sẵn sàng)
Tap Xác nhận điểm danh submit control
Assert GpsCaptureStep enters submitting substate with spinner visible
Assert copy Đang gửi điểm danh… displayed
Assert submit region aria-busy is true and submit button disabled
Wait for POST /api/v1/check-in response and assert transition to CheckInOutcomePanel with BR-02-validated Success outcome
cases.expected: AC-08g satisfied: submit in flight shows spinner and disables submit until API returns BR-02 radius-validated outcome per ui-states §4.2 submitting row

cases.title: TS-25: Successful BR-02 radius pass logs distance_meters without persisting raw client coordinates
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL; successful check-in transaction via CheckInService with in-radius coordinates
Active session with room GPS (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
check_in_attempts schema per domain model §4.10
steps: Complete successful check-in with in-radius coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200) via CheckInService integration harness
SELECT columns from check_in_attempts for the attempt row
Assert outcome Success and distance_meters is NOT NULL and ≤ session gpsRadiusMeters
Assert no latitude or longitude columns exist or are populated on check_in_attempts or attendance_records
Verify BR-02 privacy rule: coordinates used only in request handler memory per AC-08d and domain model §4.10
cases.expected: BR-02 outcome enforced at persistence: Haversine distance logged for audit without long-term coordinate storage on success path
